narrative:
Union Township has 2,216 registered voters, with 51.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.0 percentage points.
